  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Miswiring of line versus load terminals on GFCI/AFCI devices, failing to protect downstream receptacles as intended",
    "Failure to provide required GFCI/AFCI protection to downstream outlets in areas mandated by NEC 210.8 and 210.12"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Trace and identify line and load conductors for all affected multi-outlet branch circuits",
    "Rewire the GFCI/AFCI devices correctly using the load terminals for downstream protection where required",
    "Verify correct downstream protection using an external GFCI/AFCI tester"
  ],
  "rationale": "Wiring downstream loads to the line side of a GFCI/AFCI device leaves those downstream locations completely unprotected, violating NEC 210.8 and 210.12. Correct line/load separation must be maintained to ensure safety and compliance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 210.8",
    "NEC 210.12"
  ]
}
